title: Interferometric excitation fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy.
author: Maly P Strachotova D Holoubek A Herman P
content: S-EPMC11399241 PMC11399241 Interferometric excitation fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy. Fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy (FLIM) is a well-established technique with numerous imaging applications. Yet, one of the limitations of FLIM is that it only provides information about
